# PERF-020 negative: reflect types cached at startup; no per-request reflection
lang: go
file: PERF-020-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"reflect"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// reflection initialised at startup
var bodyType = reflect.TypeOf(map[string]any{"ok": true})

func Echo(c *gin.Context) {
	body := map[string]any{"ok": true}
	_ = bodyType
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, body)
}
